_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.

camera._comment_host: IP address or hostname of the Tapo camera on the local network.
camera._comment_username: Tapo account email address – used for Tapo Cloud login (backfill).
camera._comment_password: Local camera admin password – only needed for live RTSP streaming, not for cloud backfill.
camera._comment_cloud_password: Tapo app / TP-Link account password – used together with 'username' for Tapo Cloud login.

pad_roi._comment: Region of interest as [x, y, width, height] in pixels. Set to null to use full frame.

cloud_backfill._comment: Settings for downloading and processing previously saved recordings from Tapo Cloud. Requires 'username' (email) and 'cloud_password' in the camera section.
